creator: clement.lecigne@netasq.com
text:
Description is located here:

http://seclists.org/fulldisclosure/2011/Apr/86

NetBSD has issued a patch to limit the number of routes (tunnable via sysctl). I have just ported it to FreeBSD.

Fix: 

Patch against HEAD based on the NetBSD one (http://www.netbsd.org/~spz/rtadv-limit.diff).

http://clem1.be/gimme/rtadv-limit.diff
How-To-Repeat: Use tools from THC.
